name: Nyxoah SA Ordinary Shares
summary: Nyxoah S.A. is a health-technology company focused on the development and commercialization of innovative solutions for the treatment of Obstructive Sleep Apnea (OSA). The company's lead product is the Genio system, a neurostimulation therapy that delivers bilateral hypoglossal nerve stimulation. The company is headquartered in Mont-Saint-Guibert, Belgium.
